title: StackRecipe
description:
A SEPAL Stack recipe. Combine bands from multiple input images into a single multi-band stack with user-controllable band selection and renaming.

**What this recipe is for.** Combine outputs from different recipes/assets into one image — e.g. stack an optical mosaic with a radar mosaic, or with a topography asset, to feed into downstream classification or analysis. Unlike Band Math, no math is performed; bands are passed through with optional rename.

**Pipeline.** (1) Load each input image, selecting only the bands listed in `bandNames.bandNames[*].bands`. (2) Rename via `select(originalNames, outputNames)`. (3) Concatenate all images band-wise. (4) Clip to the union of bounded input geometries.

**AOI semantics.** No separate AOI field — output AOI is the union of bounded input geometries.

**Fields the LLM must populate.** Everything: `inputImagery.images` (≥ 1 image to stack) and `bandNames.bandNames` (one entry per input, listing which `originalName` → `outputName` band mappings to keep). Defaults are empty.

imageId.description: Stable UUID for this image; bandNames entries reference it via `imageId`.

id.description: SEPAL recipe id or EE asset id.

bands.description: Available bands loaded from the source. Cosmetic; the LLM should leave this absent.

bandNames.title: StackBandNames
bandNames.description: Per-image band selection and renaming. Each entry maps an `imageId` to the bands taken from that image, with `originalName` (source-side) and `outputName` (stack-side). Bands not listed are dropped.

originalName.description: Band name in the source image.

outputName.description: Renamed band in the stacked output. Must match `^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,29}$` and be unique across the entire stack.
